base_plate_anchoring_instructions.step_1: Locate posts in desired location of bay, per lift setup dimensions. Refer to lift installation manual for inside dimensions of columns, etc.
base_plate_anchoring_instructions.step_2: Match drill all base plate holes. Refer to anchor bolt installation specifications attached for drill size (3/4 inch diameter original Wej-it style expansion anchor bolts).
base_plate_anchoring_instructions.step_3: Install anchors per anchor bolt installation specifications attached. Shim under base plate as needed to ensure that posts are square and plumb (maximum of 1/4 inch) with colored shims provided (horseshoe shaped).
base_plate_anchoring_instructions.step_4: All anchors must be a minimum of 6 inches away from any expansion seam, control joint, or other floor inconsistencies.
base_plate_anchoring_instructions.step_5: Drilling thru entire slab thickness is preferred when possible. This allows anchors to be hammered flush to concrete.
